name: allaroundme
label: AllAroundMe · מסביב
//: The product's own brand, and the theme that loads when nothing else is asked for. Like every theme it is deep-merged over canabolabs, so anything it omits resolves there.

openScreen.//: The brand is a mark on plain white, not a piece of artwork with edges — so there is no background image ('background': null) and the backdrop colour below fills the screen. The card itself rides in as the logo, which keeps it sharp at any size and leaves no seam where a fitted image would have stopped.

assets.//openScreen: The full lockup — pin, arcs and wordmark — background removed.
assets.//mark: The pin on its own, background removed — the app image. /icons/* is this same mark, rendered out at each size the browser and the PWA installer ask for.
assets.//lockups: The horizontal logo, for anywhere the wordmark has to sit next to the mark. Two cuts because the wordmark flips white on dark.
